name: Cheesy Sausage Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a large bowl, making a well in the center of the mixture.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
3. Add the egg and milk mixture to the sausage mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Spoon the batter into greased miniature muffin pans, filling each about 3/4 full.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
6. Remove from the pan immediately after baking.
